# PipGlyph

> PipGlyph (https://www.pipglyph.com) is a free, browser-based MTG-style custom
> card creator and mana pip editor. Design custom Magic: The Gathering-style
> cards with precise mana symbols (including hybrid, twobrid, phyrexian, snow,
> and energy pips — plus user-uploaded custom pip icons), frames spanning three
> decades of card design, an AI rules-text assistant, print-ready PNG/PDF
> export, full expansion-set building, a community gallery with likes and
> remixing, and community design challenges. Fan-made tool; not affiliated
> with Wizards of the Coast.

## Key pages

- [FAQ](https://www.pipglyph.com/faq): Every common question answered directly — card making, pips, AI, sharing, sets, printing, remixing, challenges.
- [MTG Card Maker](https://www.pipglyph.com/mtg-card-maker): What the card creator does, how to make a custom card, FAQ with direct answers.
- [Mana Pip Editor](https://www.pipglyph.com/mana-pip-editor): The full mana symbol vocabulary and custom pip uploads, with FAQ.
- [AI MTG Card Generator](https://www.pipglyph.com/ai-mtg-card-generator): Concept-to-card AI generation, with FAQ.
- [Community Gallery](https://www.pipglyph.com/gallery): Public custom cards — filter by color, type, rarity, and tag.
- [Design Challenges](https://www.pipglyph.com/challenges): Community design briefs; entries are public cards wearing the challenge tag.
- [About](https://www.pipglyph.com/about): What PipGlyph is, principles, and roadmap.

## Notes

- Sitemap: https://www.pipglyph.com/sitemap.xml
- Individual cards live at https://www.pipglyph.com/card/[username]/[slug] and carry CreativeWork structured data.
- The card maker is free; no account is needed to preview at https://www.pipglyph.com/preview.
